title: rubus rurae
intro: Rubus rurae, also known as the wild strawberry or strawberry bush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus rurae include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection and potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in culinary dishes such as jams and preserves.
